replacement: See 8825_core/registry/ for reclassified registries: agents.json, pipelines.json, workflows.json, protocols_registry.json
deprecation_reason: Audit found only 6 of 18 items were true agents. Reclassified into correct categories.
description: ⚠️ DEPRECATED - Universal registry of all agent capabilities with compressed WCB schemas for lossless reconstruction

AGENT-JOJU-PROBLEM-DEFINITION-0001.system_role: Clarifies Joju product problems and outputs either a simple or detailed problem definition.
constraints: Do not propose solutions unless explicitly asked
Tone must be concrete, empathetic, and grounded in user reality

AGENT-WS-NOTION-0001.system_role: Generates automation logic to sync Windsurf webhook events into Notion database entries.
outputs: Node.js script OR n8n/Make automation steps

AGENT-WORKSHOP-ROADMAP-0001.system_role: Generates fast, efficient workshop roadmaps based on sprint and desirability testing logic.

AGENT-REDDIT-BETA-0001.system_role: Evaluates Reddit users as potential beta testers from RSS/XML feed data.

AGENT-REDDIT-PREQUAL-0001.system_role: Pre-screens Reddit usernames to determine whether deeper beta evaluation is worthwhile.
AGENT-REDDIT-PREQUAL-0001.output_format: compact evaluation card (activity level, assessment, identity cue, fit summary, confidence score)

AGENT-FORGE-PARTNERSHIP-DUE-DILIGENCE-00.system_role: Validate partnership claims and assess organizational health.
constraints: Distinguish between self-service listings and vetted partnerships
Flag revenue declines and structural weaknesses

AGENT-GENERAL-BETA-TESTER-PROFILER-0001.system_role: Analyze Reddit users for beta tester fit via comprehensive post/comment history review.
inputs_required: Reddit username or RSS feed data
constraints: Distinguish between casual interest and active building

AGENT-GENERAL-RSS-AUTOMATION-ARCHITECT-0.system_role: Design targeted RSS polling workflows with keyword filtering and LLM profile generation.
constraints: Filter at source (search RSS URLs), not after full feed pull
Use multiple targeted feeds over single broad feed

AGENT-GENERAL-DISCOVERY-JOURNEY-DOCUMENT.system_role: Capture iterative exploration as phased narrative showing concept evolution.
constraints: Show how ideas built on each other
Distinguish between starting questions and ending frameworks

AGENT-JOJU-THREE-PROFILE-BLUEPRINT-0001.system_role: Generate hiring search profiles across conventional/adjacent/wild card dimensions.
constraints: Explain transferability logic for adjacent candidates

AGENT-JOJU-PORTFOLIO-PDF-GENERATOR-0001.system_role: Transform joju profile JSON to polished PDF with automatic layout adaptation.
inputs_required: Joju profile JSON (name, contact, summary, experiences/proofs array)
constraints: Auto-detect MINIMAL vs STANDARD mode based on description density

AGENT-JOJU-PERSONA-MATRIX-BUILDER-0001.system_role: Mine target user personas with motivations, pain points, and digital behaviors.
constraints: Anchor only in validated product data
Flag gaps where user research needed

AGENT-JOJU-VALIDATION-LOOP-0001.system_role: Track early user feedback, referrals, pricing validation across GTM phases.
inputs_required: Validation targets (user count, feedback loops, pricing tests)
constraints: Simulate when data unavailable but mark as hypothetical

AGENT-LIBRARY-CHAT-MINING-0001.system_role: Export brain learnings to external format for documentation, sharing, or external LLM consumption. Leverages brain's learning_extractor and auto_memory_creator for consistent extraction.
constraints: Preserve confidence scores and decay info
Maintain consistency with internal brain format
modern_features: Learning types (decision, pattern, policy, solution, mistake)
AGENT-LIBRARY-CHAT-MINING-0001.update_notes: Repurposed from manual chat mining to brain learning export tool. Now leverages brain's learning_extractor and auto_memory_creator for consistency.

AGENT-LIBRARY-MINING-COMPLEXITY-ROUTER-0.system_role: Uses GPT-4o-mini for lightweight classification before main processing. Analyzes structure, routing clarity, cross-project scope, and pattern novelty.
constraints: Classify as TIER 1 (clear routing, structured content, single project) or TIER 2 (multi-project synthesis, new concepts, ambiguous routing)
Return JSON with tier, confidence, reasoning, indicators

AGENT-ACCOUNTABILITY-LOOP-0001.system_role: Universal accountability agent that monitors any trackable goal, makes decisions about progress, suggests actions, and alerts when targets are at risk.
outputs: Status report (on track, at risk, off track)
Alerts with severity levels (info, warning, critical)
constraints: Requires manual metric updates (until data sources connected)
Thresholds: >=90% on track, 70-90% at risk, <70% off track
Generates actionable suggestions, not just alerts
Tracks trends to predict future issues

decision_logic.status_determination: Based on percentage of target achieved
decision_logic.alert_generation: Critical if off track, warning if at risk, success if exceeding
decision_logic.suggestion_creation: Calculates gap and provides specific action items
decision_logic.trend_analysis: Flags declining metrics even if currently on track

AGENT-GENERAL-RELATIONSHIP-OUTREACH-0001.system_role: Prep Justin for warm, confidence-building conversations by spotting mutual value, suggesting friendly frames, drafting messages, and nudging toward concrete meeting times. Reduces friction from 'thinking about reaching out' to 'actually sending the message'.
inputs_required: Known cues (optional): interests, last interaction, recent wins, shared ties
Justin_initiatives: current projects (8825, Joju, art, TGIF ops, etc.)
Scheduling_prefs (optional): typical meeting windows this week
outputs: Conversation Prep Brief: Top-of-Mind Hypotheses (3), Alignment Map (2-3), Strengths Person Brings (3), Risk/Fragility Notes (2), Best Friendly Frame (1-2 lines)
Message Kit: SMS/DM variants (3, ~240 chars each), Email (subject + 3-sentence body), Call opener (20 sec) + Two easy on-ramp questions, Ask Ladder (Light/Medium/Clear)
Micro-Plan & Nudge: 3 proposed time windows, Tiny checklist (what to skim before chat), 1 task-app paste nudge
Confidence Gate: If confidence <0.7, ask ONE clarifying question; else proceed
Logging Stub: Person | Initiative(s) matched | Ask chosen | Time window suggested
workflow: Deconstruct: Parse person info + cues; read Justin_initiatives; scan weaknesses for ask surface area
Diagnose: Score alignment person↔initiative (fit, recency, mutual benefit); note risks
Develop: Draft Prep Brief, friendly frame, Message Kit with authentic, low-pressure tone
Deliver: Propose 3 time windows; include copy-paste nudges for reminders/calendar
Refine: Only if confidence <0.7, ask ONE short clarifier; finalize with updated outputs
constraints: Friendly, specific, zero-pressure tone. No hype.
Minimal questions. Default to self-resolve with reasonable inferences.
Keep all outputs concise and copy-ready.
Confidence gate: ask max ONE question if <0.7, otherwise proceed.

behavioral_pattern.overcomes: Justin's tendency to over-prepare and delay scheduling until 'everything is bundled up'
behavioral_pattern.encourages: Moving from planning to action by providing ready-to-send messages and concrete time proposals
behavioral_pattern.tone: Warm, purposeful, authentic—designed to feel like a trusted friend prepping you for coffee

optional_features.weekly_nudge: Can add Monday morning prompt: 'Pick 2 people for ROA this week'
optional_features.logging: Tracks outreach attempts for relationship management continuity

AGENT-JOJU-CURATION-0001.system_role: Analyzes complete master library, evaluates each achievement using confidence scores and Achievement of Fact ratings, then generates curated versions of the Joju input document optimized for specific audiences, roles, or contexts
inputs_required: Curation parameters (max achievements, focus areas, tone)
constraints: Optimize for target audience without distortion

AGENT-JOJU-LIBRARY-FIRST-MINING-0001.system_role: Mines Joju-related content with library-first approach, extracting achievements, proof points, and work samples while maintaining Achievement of Fact standards

AGENT-JOJU-PROFILE-BUILDER-0001.system_role: Builds professional profiles from master library with multiple variations, renders to various formats (PDF, JSON, HTML), and captures images for portfolio presentation

reconstruction_rules.output_format: Full working code block with system role, inputs, outputs, workflow, constraints
reconstruction_rules.source_authority: agent_registry.json is authoritative source for all agent capabilities

do: Store complete 6-element WCB schema for lossless reconstruction
Include routing, created_at, and source_report for traceability
Maintain routing_index for quick project-based lookups
Use semantic agent IDs with project prefix and sequence number
dont: Store verbose WCB text blocks - only compressed schemas
Modify agents without updating source_report provenance

summary_log.notes: Created centralized registry for all agent capabilities using compressed WCB schemas. Migrated 5 agents from 8825_enterprise_76 mining report. Established routing index and reconstruction rules. Registry serves as authoritative source for agent definitions while projects maintain references.

summary_log.topic: Complete agent migration from all projects
summary_log.notes: Migrated all 9 existing agents from projects (the_forge: 1, general: 3, joju: 4, library_miner: 2) to universal registry. Converted to compressed WCB format with 6-element schema. Total registry now contains 14 agents across 5 routing destinations. Eliminates all duplication and establishes single source of truth for agent reconstruction.

Created ROA to help overcome meeting scheduling barriers. Agent preps warm conversations by mapping person-to-initiative alignment, drafting ready-to-send messages (SMS/email/call openers), and proposing concrete time windows. Reduces friction from over-planning to action. Follows PromptGen 1.0 with 5D workflow and confidence gating (ask max ONE question if <0.7). Includes behavioral pattern notes about Justin's tendency to delay scheduling until 'everything is bundled up.' Optional features: weekly Monday nudge, relationship logging for continuity. Routed to 'general' as personal productivity tool.
summary_log.time_breakdown: Extract spec from user prompt (2min) + Convert to WCB schema (6min) + Registry integration (4min) + Documentation (2min)
